passives.name: Big Hands
passives.effects: Gain {{sti|critical strike chance|{{pp|0 to 30|key=%|0 to 3000 by 100|type='''bonus''' health|color=hp|label=Crit chance}}}} {{as|critical strike chance}}.

effects_structured.raw: Gain critical strike chance scaling with bonus health (up to 30%).

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Verified Big Hands scaling semantics from page-level source: crit chance scales at 1% per 100 bonus health, capped at 30% at 3000 bonus health.
Mode-variant note: patch-history entries show alternate stat/cost packages in rotating modes; canonical baseline remains Tier-1 dataset values for this repository snapshot.
